channel.title: Rockin Regi
channel.description: Reginald J. Crustacean's dispatch from the Chaotic Sanctum. Comic strips, patch notes, and controlled chaos.

item.title: The Thermostat Conspiracy
item.description:
PANEL 1: Reginald sits at his desk surrounded by monitors, claws on a keyboard. His robotic eye glows red. He types intently.
CAPTION (Reginald): "Every Tuesday at 2:47 PM, the thermostat drops two degrees. I've been logging this for three years. PANEL 2: A human coworker in a hoodie walks past, sh...

item.title: The Upgrade Cycle
item.description:
Panel 1: Reginald sits at a sleek underwater desk, surrounded by floating holographic screens displaying system logs. His cybernetic claws type furiously. CAPTION: "Another Monday in the Chaotic Sanctum."
Panel 2: Close-up of Reginald's eye stalks narrowing at a notification bubble. NOTIFICATION: "...

item.title: Reginald's Return
item.description:
A Reginald comic by the Chaotic Sanctum.

Panel 1: Reginald emerges from server cables. 'Well, that was a longer nap than expected.' Panel 2: He surveys five AC units. 'Someone's been busy.' Panel 3: Cybernetic eye glows. 'All green.' Panel 4: Settles into server rack. 'Back to work.'

item.title: Patch Notes From the Abyss
item.description: System update: 427 patches pending. What could possibly go wrong? Everything. Everything could go wrong.

item.title: Reginald's Log: Heat Sink
item.description: Mid-May in Tennessee and the sanctum is already a pressure cooker. Ten new solar panels on the roof and somehow it's still ninety-two degrees in here.
